title: Property Consultant - Wadhwa Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Wadhwa Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Wadhwa Group in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Wadhwa Group:
Wadhwa Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wadhwa Group!
